puzzle.title: The Bearer of a Grave Message
puzzle.intro: A righteous soul was sent to guide a people lost in unprecedented transgressions. This messenger stood firm, delivering a stark warning against a corruption that defied the natural order. Despite earnest pleas, the community plunged deeper into darkness, setting the stage for a divine reckoning unlike any other. Can you identify this steadfast servant of Allah?
clues: I was a relative of another great prophet, and I migrated with him, leaving our homeland behind.
I was sent to a people whose wickedness was unique, a transgression no creation had committed before them.
My own household was divided; a close family member secretly sided with the disbelievers.
Angels, in the form of handsome young men, came to my home as guests, causing me great distress for their safety.
I offered my own daughters in marriage to my people in a desperate attempt to turn them away from their shameful acts.
My people were destroyed by a terrible cry and a rain of stones of baked clay, while I and my family, except for one, were saved by leaving in the dead of night.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Shu'ayb
Prophet Salih
Prophet Lut
Prophet Hud
Prophet Nuh

trial.label: What Was My Primary Trial?
options: Convincing a tyrant king not to burn me in a fire.
Dealing with my brothers' jealousy and being thrown into a well.
Confronting a people engaged in unprecedented sexual immorality.
Leading my people out of bondage from a powerful pharaoh.
Building a massive ship to save the believers from a great flood.
trial.answer: Confronting a people engaged in unprecedented sexual immorality.

location.label: What Was the Location of My Mission?
options: The city of Madyan
The ancient city of Iram
The land of Egypt under Pharaoh
The cities of Sodom and Gomorrah
The city of Nineveh
location.answer: The cities of Sodom and Gomorrah

outcome.label: What Was the Ultimate Outcome?
options: The cities were overturned and showered with stones of baked clay.
My people were swallowed by the earth along with their wealthy leader.
My people were destroyed by a violent wind for seven nights and eight days.
My people were afflicted with plagues like locusts, lice, and frogs.
A giant fish swallowed me after I abandoned my mission.
outcome.answer: The cities were overturned and showered with stones of baked clay.

puzzle.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا جَعَلْنَا عَـٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهَا حِجَارَةًۭ مِّن سِجِّيلٍۢ مَّنضُودٍۢ
puzzle.verse: So when Our command came, We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of layered hard clay, [which were] (11:82)
